quickIntroSection.title: About {name} Maintenance Center
quickIntroSection.description: With over 10 years of experience in motorcycle maintenance and repair, {name} is proud to be a trusted destination for thousands of customers every year. We provide services from routine maintenance, oil changes, engine repair, to genuine spare parts replacement — all performed by skilled technicians.

quality.title: Trusted & High Quality
quality.description: Committed to using genuine parts, precise techniques, and clear warranties.

team.title: Professional Team
team.description: Experienced technicians, thoroughly trained and dedicated to customer service.

booking.title: Easy Booking
booking.description: Just a few simple steps to book online — saving time, serving quickly.

full.title: Comprehensive Maintenance Package
full.description: Full vehicle check, oil change, air filter cleaning, chain adjustment, and bolt tightening.

oil.title: Oil Change + Inspection Combo
oil.description: Genuine oil change and check of 10 essential components.

newCustomer.title: New Customer Offer

testimonialsSection.title: What our customers say about us?
testimonialsSection.nguyenContent: Excellent service, enthusiastic and professional staff. My bike runs much smoother after maintenance!
testimonialsSection.tranContent: I’m very satisfied with the comprehensive maintenance combo—reasonable price and fast service.
testimonialsSection.leContent: The center works transparently with clear pricing. I’ll definitely return regularly!
testimonialsSection.phamContent: Great first-time offer! I received a discount and helpful consultation.

whyChooseUsSection.title: Why choose us?
whyChooseUsSection.subtitle: We always prioritize customer satisfaction and safety. Here’s why our customers trust us:
whyChooseUsSection.qualityDesc: We commit to providing high-quality repair and maintenance with genuine parts.
whyChooseUsSection.expertDesc: Our technicians are well-trained, experienced, and dedicated to every vehicle.
whyChooseUsSection.timelyDesc: Receive - process - return your vehicle on time, saving your time.
whyChooseUsSection.dedicatedDesc: Friendly consultation, always ready to assist for the best customer experience.
